productDisplayName: FILA Men Dls Spry Black Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those who enjoy those who love to run and play, the DLS Spry Sports shoe from fila combines comfort and stability at its best. With a heavily meshed upper and great ergonomic construction, this is one classic sports shoe.UpperHeavily meshed upper and inner bootie for ultimate ventilation and fresh comfort to the feetStrategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customized FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionDynamic Landing System (DLS) in the heel for absolute impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole for durability Flex grooves for ease of movementModified waffle pattern lugs throughout the periphery with diamond shaped lugs on the central length for absolute grip and tractionOutsole embedded on the forefoot as a toe guard for enhanced forefoot protection and durabilityShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
